case_title: MARINA DIAZ VS. YADER MEDINA ET AL

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MARINA

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MARINA AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, YADER ALSO KNOWN AS YADER MEDINA-DIAZ DOES 1 TO I-V INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-27-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-04-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-19-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-08-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR OBNINSKY, VICTOR PETER AS ATTORNEY FOR DIAZ, MARINA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-27-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-19-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
